SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORSINI, TIMOTHY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS-SONOMA, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
